_comment: Walkthrough route for automated Possessioner testing.
load_state: emulator save-state slot to load before navigating the in-game
menu. Emulator save states are volatile; slot 0 is currently the main menu.
Omit to skip loading a save state (assumes the emulator is already running
and showing the main menu).
file_index: zero-based index used by load_file_from_main_menu to pick which
in-game save file to load. 0 = first file, 1 = second, etc.
In-game saves are persistent and correspond to the five checkpoints in
docs/TODO.md (HQ, maintenance room, junk shop, doctor's office, Prim).
action_index: zero-based DOWN-presses before ENTER in the verb/action menu.
target_index: zero-based DOWN-presses before ENTER in the target submenu.
repeat: how many times to execute the same action+target (default 1).
IMPORTANT: action_index and target_index values are ESTIMATES derived from
docs/walkthrough.htm. Verify by running run_walkthrough.py and inspecting
the output screenshots.
Typical verb ordering in most rooms (may vary by location):
0=見る(Look), 1=話す(Talk), 2=調べる(Examine), 3=移動(Move), 4=考える(Think)
Some rooms add extra verbs (昇る/乗る/脱ぐ/使う/開ける/乱入する) at
context-dependent positions — verify those individually.
For chained Move steps (e.g. '移動 廊下 → 本部') add one step per arrow;
after each Move the next room's menu appears and action_index resets.

0.description: HQ (本部) after Alisa box scene
0._source: docs/walkthrough.htm § 本部 (after コンピューターシステム)

steps._verify: Examine the box — confirm the scene plays
Open the box — action_index may shift if 開ける appears differently
Talk to Nedra x4 — target_index=0 if Nedra is first in Talk submenu
Move → Rest room (控室) from hallway
Talk to Honhoa x2 in rest room

1.description: Maintenance room (整備室) after Eris encounter

steps._verify: Climb stairs (昇る) — action_index may be different; verify position
Take off clothes (脱ぐ) — action_index varies; verify

4._source: docs/walkthrough.htm — late game, before Prim fight

steps._comment: Steps for this save state need to be derived from a later section of the walkthrough. Fill in after verifying slots 0-3.
